mac-cheese-the-cheesimus-maximus.name: Mac & Cheese: The Cheesimus Maximus
instructions: In a large pot over medium heat, combine the pasta and milk. Bring the milk to a simmer and cook until the pasta is tender, 8–10 minutes.
Once the pasta is cooked, remove the pan from the heat and add the butter, cheddar cheese, salt, and pepper. Stir until fully combined. Fold in the bacon.
Divide between serving bowls and top with the Parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

mac-and-cheese-recipe-comedera.name: Mac And Cheese Recipe
instructions: En una olla, derrite la mantequilla y agrega la harina de trigo. Mezcla y cocina sin dejar de mover por un minuto hasta que dore.
Agrega la paprika, la mostaza en polvo y la pimienta negra, mezcla muy bien.
Fold milk and mix till a homogenous cream remains.
Incorpora los macarrones cocidos, una cucharadita de sal y mezcla muy bien.
Agrega el queso cheddar y el mozzarella rallado, mezcla bien.
Sigue mezclando hasta que los quesos se derritan y queden bien cremosos.
Sirve y disfruta.

mahi-mahi-skewers-with-tapenade-and-cous.name: Mahi-mahi Skewers With Tapenade And Couscous
instructions: Preheat broiler. Bring 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons water to boil in heavy medium saucepan. Stir in couscous and 1/2 teaspoon coarse salt. Remove from heat. Cover and let stand until water is absorbed and couscous is tender, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, stir tapenade, lemon juice, 1 teaspoon pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon coarse salt in small bowl to blend. Transfer 31/2 tablespoons tapenade mixture to another small bowl and reserve for couscous.
Thread fish pieces onto 4 metal skewers; arrange on broiler tray. Brush fish on both sides with remaining tapenade mixture. Broil fish until just opaque in center, about 4 minutes per side.
Fluff couscous with fork. Gently stir in reserved tapenade mixture. Stir in pico de gallo or serve it alongside. Mound couscous on plates. Top with fish skewers.

make-a-delicious-meat-stir-fry-with-pepp.name: Make A Delicious Meat Stir-fry With Peppers
make-a-delicious-meat-stir-fry-with-pepp.original_name: Haz un delicioso salteado de carne con pimientos

ingredients.item: 400 gr de carne de res en tiras finas
Optional: A pint of sugar to caramelize onion

instructions: First, make sure you cut all the ingredients before you start. The meat in fine strips, the peppers in medium strips and the onion in julian. Having everything ready will help you with nothing burning while cooking.
Warm a big frying pan or a wok with medium-high heat. Add the oil and let it get hot well.
Put the meat into the frying pan and have salt and pepper. He cooks for about 3 minutes, and moves her to get her to be dyed all over.
In the same frying pan, add onion and a little more oil if necessary. Cooking for about two minutes, stirring so that it doesn't get burned.
When the onion is soft and slightly golden, add the peppers and minced garlic. It's about 3-4 minutes till the peppers are tender but still crispy.
Readd meat to frying pan with soya sauce. Revolves well so that all flavors blend and cook for 1-2 more minutes so that the meat will finish cooking.
Ready to enjoy!

make-a-delicious-vegan-almond-cheese-com.name: Make A Delicious Vegan Almond Cheese
make-a-delicious-vegan-almond-cheese-com.original_name: Haz un rico queso vegano de almendra casero
instructions: Put raw almonds into a glass bin and cover them with water. Cover them and put them in the refrigerator. Keep them moist for 24 hours. After 24 hours, run and rinse and rinse very well.
Add to the blender or food processing machine moist almonds, water, lemon juice, olive oil, nutritional yeast, powder garlic and salt.
Loan all the ingredients till the almonds are well shredded.
Coloca en un recipiente y agrega chile troceado y las hierbas frescas.
Mix very well till the ingredients are as integrated as possible.
Serves and goes with toasted bread, paddles of bread, vegetables or totopes.

make-ahead-french-toast-casserole.name: Make-ahead French Toast Casserole

ingredients.item: Brioche or challah bread loaf (about 1 pound; 453g)
Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume
plus 1 1/2 teaspoons granulated sugar (about 3 3/4 ounces; 105g), divided (see notes)
chopped nuts, powdered sugar, and fresh berries, for serving (optional)

instructions: Adjust oven rack to top third and lower third position and preheat oven to 121°C (120ºC). Set a wire rack inside two 13- by 18-inch rimmed baking sheets. Arrange bread slices in a single layer on racks and bake until bread is dried out, about 20 minutes, flipping bread and rotating baking sheets halfway through. Let cool 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, butter a 9- by 13-inch glass or ceramic baking dish. In a large bowl, whisk eggs, vanilla, salt, nutmeg (if using), 1/2 cup of the sugar, and 1 1/2 teaspoons of the cinnamon to thoroughly combine. Add milk and whisk to blend. Working with 2 or 3 toasted bread slices at a time, soak bread slices in egg mixture, flipping once, just until the bread absorbs the liquid but remains intact, 1 to 2 minutes, then arrange bread in prepared baking dish, overlapping slices. Pour any remaining egg mixture over bread slices. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until bread is saturated, at least 1 1/2 hours or up to 12 hours.

Adjust oven rack to middle position and preheat oven to 163°C (160ºC). Let casserole sit at room temperature while oven preheats; remove plastic wrap. Bake in preheated oven until browned and set, about 40 minutes. Remove from oven and preheat broiler. Stir together remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons sugar and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon in a small bowl. Using a pastry brush, evenly brush bread with melted butter, then sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar. Broil until bread is crisp and browned in spots, about 4 minutes. Serve warm with maple syrup, chopped nuts, powdered sugar, and fresh berries, if desired.

make-ahead-frozen-yogurt-parfaits.name: Make-ahead Frozen Yogurt Parfaits
instructions: Combine raspberries and ½ cup white sugar in a bowl. Crush with a potato masher into a puree. Cover and let sit out for 1 hour.
Pass berry puree through a fine mesh strainer to remove seeds. Add blueberries, stir, and keep in the refrigerator until needed.
Whisk yogurt, vanilla, lemon zest, and sugar for frozen yogurt together in a bowl until sugar dissolves and the mixture is light and fluffy. Transfer into a piping bag and refrigerate until needed.

Add 2 tablespoons of granola into an 8-ounce jar, or similar vessel. Top with 2 tablespoons of the fruit mixture. Try to make sure some of the fruit sauce is touching the glass so you can see the layers when frozen. Top with 2 heaping tablespoons of the yogurt mixture.
Repeat twice more for a total of 3 layers. Top can be garnished with any remaining fruit and sauce.
Freeze until frozen solid, about 8 hours, or overnight.
Serve and enjoy!

malted-vanilla-milk-shakes.name: Malted Vanilla Milk Shakes

ingredients.prep: such as Whoppers or Maltesers; about 1 ounce

instructions: Place two 12-ounce (or larger) glasses in freezer to chill 1 hour.

Pour milk into blender. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; discard bean. Cover and blend 15 seconds. Add ice cream and malted milk powder and blend until thick and creamy, stopping to push down ice cream as necessary. Divide milk shake between chilled glasses. Top each with crushed malted milk balls and serve.

mango-smoothie-pequerecetas.name: Mango Smoothie

ingredients.item: 250 ml cold milk (1 cup) - can be whole, half-baked or vegetable
1 natural or Greek yogurt (125 g) - ½ cm

instructions: Pelamos los mangos, retiramos el hueso central y cortamos la pulpa en trozos.
We put the mango in the mixer with milk and yogurt and honey or sugar if we want to sweetens more.
We have grown till we get a creamy and clumsy blend. If we want them cold and cold, we'll add the ice cubes and we'll fight them again till they're integrated.
Servimos de inmediato en vasos altos. Podemos decorar con dados de mango o unas hojas de menta.

mango-upside-down-cake.name: Mango Upside-down Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180 degrees C). Line an 8-inch square baking dish with enough parchment paper to overhang on all sides.
Arrange mango slices in an overlapping pattern in bottom of the prepared dish.
Combine sugar, eggs, yogurt, and oil in a large bowl; stir until smooth. Fold in flour, coconut, and baking powder until just combined. Spoon batter over sliced mango; spread evenly to edges.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, 45 to 50 minutes. Cool in the dish for 15 minutes. Invert onto a serving plate; carefully peel off parchment paper. Cool completely before slicing.

mango-sesame-dressing.name: Mango-sesame Dressing
instructions: Combine all ingredients in blender. Cover tightly; blend until dressing is smooth. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

maple-pumpkin-pie.name: Maple Pumpkin Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Line a 9-inch pie plate with pie crust.

Combine evaporated milk, pumpkin, sugar, eggs, maple syrup, maple extract, cinnamon, salt, vanilla extract, and nutmeg in a bowl. Mix until well blended using an electric mixer. Pour into the pie crust.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 163°C (165 degrees C) and continue baking until a knife inserted into the pie comes out clean, about 30 minutes.

maple-roasted-carrots-with-olives-almond.name: Maple Roasted Carrots With Olives + Almonds + Mint
instructions: To make the glaze: Cook the balsamic vinegar in a small saucepan over medium heat for 10 – 15 minutes or until reduced by half and slightly thick.
For the carrots: Preheat the oven to 204°C.

Wash, dry and peel carrots(if not using rainbow carrots). Cut carrots in half lengthwise so that the carrots are about ½ inch thick across. If using larger carrots, you may need to cut carrots in half again (to make quarters). Toss them in olive oil, salt and pepper and arrange in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Drizzle carrots with maple syrup and cook in the oven. After 10 minutes, flip carrots and cook for another 5 minutes or until a deep golden brown.

For the topping:  In a small oven-proof dish, bake almonds in the oven alongside the carrots for 5-10 minutes. Checking every 3 minutes until golden brown. Once light brown, remove from the oven and set aside.
Pit and chop olives, place in a small bowl. Stir in lemon zest and olive oil. Set aside.
Chop mint and set aside.
To assemble: Arrange carrots on a serving dish, top with chopped olives, almonds, mint and finish with a drizzle of balsamic glaze.
Serve warm and enjoy.

margaritas-with-a-bite.name: Margaritas With A Bite
instructions: In a blender, combine tequila, triple sec and limeade concentrate.
Fill blender to the top with ice.
Blend, adding additional ice while blending, until thick and smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.

margherita-pizza-beans.name: Margherita Pizza Beans

ingredients.item: -oz. cans white beans (such as cannellini or butter)

ingredients.prep: stems reserved, plus more for serving

instructions: Heat broiler. Halve large tomatoes crosswise (through the equator). Starting with cut sides, grate tomatoes on the large holes of a box grater into a medium bowl; discard or compost skins. Add beans and season generously with salt and pepper.

Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high. Add cherry tomatoes; cook, shaking pan occasionally, until browned in spots, about 3 minutes. Add garlic; cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Stir in grated tomato mixture and reserved basil stems. Cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture is thickened and flavorful, 10–15 minutes. Taste and season with salt and pepper.

Remove basil stems from pan; stir in ¼ cup basil leaves. Shake skillet to evenly distribute beans. Top with mozzarella and 2 Tbsp. Parmesan. Broil until cheese is melted and browned in spots, about 3 minutes.
Spoon tomato beans over toast as desired. Top with more basil leaves and Parmesan and drizzle with oil. Season generously with more pepper.

marinated-anchovy-argiro.name: Marinated Anchovy
instructions: We clean the anchovy first. Pull the head with one move and remove the intestines together.
Wash and drain in a colander.
In a bowl, add a layer of anchovy, sprinkle salt and again coat.
Repeat the process until the materials are finished.
In the end we pour the vinegar, making sure it is covered well.
Cover the bowl and leave for 8 hours on the kitchen counter in a cool spot.
When the eight hours go by, we catch a fish and with the fingers open the butterfly fish.
So they separate the two fillets by making sure they're kept together.
Pull and remove the fish bone.
It leaves very easily, after being baked in salt and vinegar and softened properly.
Place them in a glass bowl, in rows and create layers of fillets.
If we want now, we can put some finely chopped garlic, chopped hot pepper or herbs.
After laying all the anchovy fillets, pour with sunflower oil and make sure everything is covered well.
Cover and refrigerate for about 2 months.
Serve it plain with some olive oil as a ouzo.

marmalade-almond-muffin-lezzet.name: Marmalade Almond Muffin
instructions: 1. Practical recipes include a private place.
2. Extract the flour into a large bowl.
3. Participating and adding the butter.
4. Rein the bark of orange and add powder to the dough with sugar and powder almond.
5. Beat eggs.
6. Add and mix the mixture together with Marmelat and milk.
7. Share the mixture into the 12 muffin mold you lubricate with butter.
8. File almonds sprinkle on dough.
9. Cook and serve for 20 minutes in the oven with a set of 170 joints.

meat-pads-teleculinaria.name: Meat Pads
instructions: Prepare the dough: place the flour on the countertop, open a hole in the center, place the butter there and a pinch of salt and wrap well, adding the water gradually. Knead everything real good until it's on. Let it rest for about 30 minutes.

Prepare the filling: praise the onion and garlic chopped into a pot with butter. Add the meat and let cook a few minutes, stirring. Add the milk and flour, season with salt and pepper and stir until creamy, but not much liquid. Take it off and let it cool.
Extend the dough, cut into rectangular pieces and place some of the meat preparation in the center. Close cushion type, brush with egg beaten and fry in abundant and very hot oil.

meat-patties-argiro.name: Meat Patties
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep pan or plate pot and marinate the onion over low heat for 4 to 5 minutes, make it transparent.
Add the minced meat and sauté it well until it changes color.
Add the chopped tomato, salt, pepper and cover.
Simmer the minced meat for 15 minutes in low heat because its liquids are few.
Let the minced meat dry completely.
Add the milk to a pot and add the semolina, stirring well until the mixture thickens and becomes cream.
Let it cool a little.
Add the eggs one at a time and mix well with the wire, so that the cream absorbs them.
Finally add the graviera and cooked minced meat.
Open the sheet from the package and spread it on the counter.
With a brush, oil a leaf and fold it along.
Cut it in half.
Each card gives us two burrets.
Spread some filling, fold the edges (flager) and roll.
We do the same with the rest of the leaves and stuffing.
Add the burrets to an oily baking pan.
Oil them with a brush and baking them in a well pre-heated evening at 180°C on the resistors, on the last grill, for 25 to 30 minutes, until golden.
We can fry them if we want.
Ideal for buffets and parties!

meat-stuffed-peppers-in-air-fryer-pequer.name: Meat Stuffed Peppers In Air Fryer
meat-stuffed-peppers-in-air-fryer-pequer.original_name: Pimientos rellenos de carne en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 6 pimientos (del color que prefiramos, nosotros hemos usado rojos y amarillos)
800 g de carne picada (de cerdo y ternera)
125 g de queso rallado (por ejemplo, gouda o mozzarella)
Freidora de aire, p.ej. nosotros hemos utilizado la cosori turbo blaze

instructions: We purport air frying for 5 minutes at 200 °. Meanwhile we wash the peppers, cut up the top and remove the seeds and the white parts from inside. We pat the cover of the pits into cubes and reserve them for later use.

We cut the onions also into small cubes and cut the garlic finely. Once the airfryer has been pressurized, we place empty peppers inside the frying and cook them at 200 ° for 6 minutes. In our airfryer model they suit up to 4 peppers at once, so we make two tands and reserve them once ready.

While they cook their peppers, we can get ready for minced meat. To do so, we heated olive oil into a frying pan and added the chopped onion, garlic and pits we had previously booked. We cook them with low heat till they soft and at that time we add minced meat.
Once meat is well cooked, we add salt and Italian herbs and then we add tin tomatoes. We mix everything up and let them cook at low heat for 15 minutes.
We filled the peppers with minced meat and tomato and we cook them again for 4 minutes at 200 ″ 3 ″ at the air fryer.
After 4 minutes, we open the airfryer basket and sprinkle the grilled cheese above the stuffed peppers. We program another 4 minutes at 200 ″ 3 ″ or till the cheese has been completely melted
Carefully we don't get burned we get our stuffed peppers out of the air fryer and if we like them, we'll add some minced parsley to give them a note of color and smell

meatballs-with-pita-recipe-lezzet.name: Meatballs With Pita Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 mins of galeta boiled or owl bread interior Home
You can bring a saucer flavor to meatballs using dana and lamb mixed meat instead.
Instead of galeta boiled, you can make meatballs have a softer texture.

instructions: 1. Add a large coarse meat, grated onion, garlic, galeta flour, salt, pepper and kimyon.

mediterranean-meal-prep.name: Mediterranean Meal Prep
instructions: Make the hummus: Add the chickpeas to a food processor with the garlic, paprika, salt, cumin, lemon juice, 2 tablespoons of olive oil, and the water. Pulse until creamy.
Transfer the hummus to a container and top with more olive oil and red pepper flakes. The hummus will keep in the refrigerator for up to 4 days.
Make the Mediterranean bowl: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Once hot, add 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Pour the quinoa into the skillet and toast for 3-4 minutes, or until light golden brown.

Add the vegetable broth, thyme, tarragon, parsley, juice of 1 lemon, and salt and stir to combine. Bring to a boil, then cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the quinoa is fluffy. Remove the pan from the heat.
Slice the cucumbers, halve the tomatoes, chop the olives, and dice the onion.
Place all of the vegetables in a medium bowl. Add the parsley, remaining tablespoon of olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
To assemble a bowl, add ¼ of the quinoa, ¼ of the vegetables, and ¼ of the hummus to a resealable container. Top the vegetables with crumbled feta.
Store the bowls in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
Enjoy!

memphis-bbq-dry-rub.name: Memphis Bbq Dry Rub
instructions: Whisk brown sugar, black pepper, paprika, white pepper, red pepper flakes, salt, chili powder, and garlic powder together in a bowl. Store in an airtight container.

mexican-burritos-comedera.name: Mexican Burritos

ingredients.item: 6  tortillas de trigo (es importante que sean grandes, a diferencia de las usadas para tacos.)
2 Jalapeño chilies (optional if you have an attic)
Aceite (de sabor neutro, como canola o girasol.)

instructions: Peel onion and garlic. Cut the first into small cubes and shredded the second.
Wash the peppers and tomato and chilies. Retiring the white vein and chili and peppers seeds. Cut everything into small cubes.
Warm up a frying pan with a pair of tablespoons of oil and cook onion and garlic with medium heat, till onion starts to become clear.
Add the tomatoes, pepples and cut chilies to the mixture and let them cook for a few minutes so that the tomato evaporate its liquid.
Remove the ingredients into the frying pan and add the meat. Meg and lower the intensity of the fire.
Let the meat cook in the frying pan. It's usually ready before 15 minutes.
You can use the cooking time of the meat to scrape or cut the cheese into pieces.
Once you cook the meat, add salt and pepper to your taste. Mix the whole stew and try. That's right, if necessary.

It heats up very slightly every omelette onto a low-intensity plate (it's best to slightly grease the plate so they don't stick or get blackened). We have to do it quickly so that tortillas aren't tighten up.
Expand every omelette into a plate and distribute frying beans onto its central part. Then cover with a handful of flesh and sprinkle abundant cheese onto them.
Dobla los extremos de la tortilla hacia adentro, y enrolla hasta formar un tubo.

mexican-corn-on-the-cob-elote.name: Mexican Corn On The Cob (elote)
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat.
Grill corn on the preheated grill until hot and lightly charred all over, 7 to 10 minutes.
Roll corn in melted butter, then spread evenly with mayonnaise. Sprinkle with cotija cheese.
Serve with lime wedges.

microwave-hot-fudge-sauce.name: Microwave Hot Fudge Sauce

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Whisk together ¾ cup light corn syrup, ½ cup whole milk, 2 tsp. vanilla extract, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high power until milk is just starting to simmer, 1–2 minutes. Remove from microwave and add 2 cups semisweet chocolate chips (about 12 oz.). Let sit 2 minutes, then whisk until smooth.
Do Ahead: Hot fudge can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

milk-pie-argiro.name: Milk Pie
instructions: Mix in a pot all the ingredients for the syrup.
After boiling, stop mixing and set them on medium heat for 5 minutes.
Remove the syrup from the heat, remove the lemon cups and let it cool.

minced-meat-quiche-teleculinaria.name: Minced Meat Quiche
instructions: Prepare the dough: place the ingredients indicated in a food processor and turn on until you get a pasta ball. Wrap in adherent film and lead to cold for 30 minutes.

Prepare o recheio: leve ao lume um tacho com um fio de azeite, junte a cebola e o alho, picados, e deixe refogar. Adicione a carne e deixe cozinhar por cerca de 5 minutos, mexendo. Acrescente depois a polpa de tomate, envolva e tempere com sal e pimenta. Deixe cozinhar durante mais 5 minutos. Retire e deixe arrefecer.
Numa tigela, bata os ovos com as natas e tempere com sal e pimenta. Reserve.

After the specified time, extend the dough on the bench, sprinkled with flour, and line the interior in a shape (22 cm in diameter). Fill it with the egg preparation and then the meat, the bacon cubes and the cheese in pieces.
Take it in the oven, preheated at 160oC, until the quiche is golden (about 25 to 30 minutes). Take it off, let it cool, unshape it and serve it.

mini-caramel-apples.name: Mini Caramel Apples
instructions: Wash and dry the apples, and remove the stems. Using a skewer, carefully make holes in the top of each apple. Insert a popsicle stick into each apple, and set aside.
Line a large cutting board with parchment paper. Place each of the optional toppings into small, individual bowls, and set aside.

In a small saucepan over medium-low, heat the sugar until melted, gently stirring every 15-30 seconds to ensure even heating. Once the sugar starts to clump, whisk every 30 seconds until melted, about 10-15 minutes total. Keep an eye on it to make sure sugar does not burn. Remove the caramel from heat, and carefully whisk in the butter. The mixture will bubble. Pour in the heavy cream, vanilla, and salt. Stir until well combined.

Allow caramel to cool slightly, about 5 minutes, then taste and add more salt if desired. Dip each apple individually, transferring the caramel to a heat-safe dish, if desired. If needed, hold the saucepan or dish to one side to make it easier to fully coat the apples.
Immediately add toppings to each dipped apple, if using, then transfer to your parchment-lined cutting board to cool completely.
Enjoy!

minty-chicken-meatballs.name: Minty Chicken Meatballs

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, cut crosswise on a diagonal 1" thick

instructions: Finely chop enough mint leaves from 2 bunches mint (about 2 oz.), stems removed, to make 2 Tbsp. and set aside for making the sauce. Set some leaves aside separately for serving. Transfer remaining mint to a blender or food processor; add 1 large egg, 1 small onion, very coarsely chopped, 8 garlic cloves, 1 jalapeño, halved, seeds removed, 2½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, and ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil. Blend until mostly smooth and no visible pieces of onion remain. Pour mixture into a large bowl and mix in ⅔ cup plain fine dry breadcrumbs; let sit 5 minutes. Add 1 lb. ground chicken and, using your hands, mix thoroughly and aggressively until evenly combined. (Don’t be afraid of overworking. This mixing process will help the meatballs stay together. The mixture should be paste-like.) Working one at a time, scoop out ¼-cup portions; roll into balls.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium skillet over medium. Cook meatballs, turning often to brown on all sides and help them keep their shape and and reducing heat to low if browning too quickly, until cooked through and a thermometer inserted into the center registers 165°, 9–12 minutes. (Meatballs have a tendency to slump slightly as they cook. Turning them often will help them keep their shape, but don’t fret if they don’t turn out perfectly round.)

Whisk 1 garlic clove, finely grated, 1⅓ cups plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, 2 tsp. finely grated lemon zest, 2 tsp. fresh lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and reserved chopped mint in a small bowl. Taste sauce and season with more salt if needed. Place 3 Persian cucumbers, halved lengthwise, cut crosswise on a diagonal 1" thick, and a pinch of salt in a medium bowl, drizzle with oil, and toss to coat.
Spread sauce over a platter. Arrange meatballs and seasoned cucumbers on top. Scatter reserved mint leaves over and drizzle with more oil.

miso-tahini-noodles-with-asparagus-and-t.name: Miso-tahini Noodles With Asparagus And Tofu

ingredients.prep: trimmed, sliced 2" thick on a diagonal
halved lengthwise, thinly sliced on a diagonal
such as basil, mint, and/or cilantro

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast cashews on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop and set aside.
Meanwhile, blend ginger, garlic, soy sauce, mirin, tahini, vinegar, and miso in a blender until smooth. Transfer to a large bowl.
Cut tofu into ½"-thick strips, then into squares. Pat dry with paper towels. Add tofu to bowl and gently toss to coat.

Cook asparagus in a large pot of boiling water until bright green and tender, about 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer asparagus to a bowl of ice water to cool; pat dry. Reserve pot with water.
Bring reserved pot of water back to a boil and cook noodles according to package directions. Drain and rinse under cold water to cool slightly.
Add asparagus, noodles, scallions, cucumbers, and herbs to bowl. Season with salt and toss to coat.
Divide noodles among bowls. Top with reserved cashews.

mixed-berry-gazpacho-with-basil.name: Mixed Berry Gazpacho With Basil

ingredients.item: Mixed berries (about 1 lb.); if using strawberries

ingredients.prep: torn into pieces, plus small leaves for garnish

instructions: Combine first 6 ingredients and basil sprig in a medium heatproof bowl; toss to coat. Cover with plastic wrap. Place over a large saucepan of simmering water; cook for 10 minutes.
Let cool for 15 minutes. Chill until cold, about 4 hours. DO AHEAD: Berry gazpacho can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Divide fruit and juices among bowls; drizzle with oil, garnish with basil leaves and pepper, and top with a scoop of ice cream.

mortadella-bundles-with-cottage-cheese-t.name: Mortadella Bundles With Cottage Cheese
instructions: Lay the curd in a bowl and add the finely broken nuts as well as the chopped corianders. Season it with salt and pepper and wrap it all in very well.
Place the mortadella slices on a board and have 1 spoon (soup) of the curd filling in the center of each.
Close the slices with if they were tuxedos and tie them with an onion stem, previously boiled in water. Serve right away.

mosaic-jelly-cake-lezzet.name: Mosaic Jelly Cake

ingredients.item: 1 cup pineapple juice or apple suy  u

instructions: 1. Sand cake base with roller very light inceltin.

mud-and-worms.name: Mud And Worms
instructions: Place cookies into a resealable plastic bag and crush with a rolling pin to make crumbs.
Combine pudding mix and milk together in a bowl, stirring for 2 minutes.

Sprinkle about 1/3 of the crushed cookie crumbs into the bottom of a serving bowl; spoon chocolate pudding over crumbs and smooth out the top. Sprinkle remaining chocolate cookie crumbs on top to resemble dirt.
Poke gummy worms halfway into the dirt. Refrigerate until serving.

muffins-with-jam-argiro.name: Muffins With Jam
instructions: For muffins with jam, heat the oven first to 170 degrees C.
Place twelve caramel cards in the baking pan for cupcakes.

mulled-wine.name: Mulled Wine

ingredients.item: Cinnamon sticks plus more for garnish

instructions: Press stem (pointed) end of 10 whole cloves into each of 2 tangerines, clementines, or small oranges, piercing through the skin.
Place citrus in a large pot and add Merlot, fresh apple cider, Lady apples (if using), cinnamon sticks, and green cardamom pods, cracked.
Bring to a bare simmer over medium-low heat; cook gently for 20 minutes.
Do Ahead: Mulled wine can be made to this point up to 2 hours ahead. Cover and let stand at room temperature. Rewarm gently over medium-low heat before continuing.
Stir in tawny port.
Divide among 12 glasses; garnish each with a cinnamon stick (if using) and a Lady apple, if desired.

mullet-fish-with-eskabes-sauce-lezzet.name: Mullet Fish With Cook Sauce
instructions: 1. Peel and repel the onion.
2. Coastal leaf.
3. Wash and remove the barley fish.
4. Cut off the red pepper and cut to two parts to length.
5. Heat the 2 spoon olive oil in the pan and fry the fish.
6. Carrot, dry onion, kere leaf, thyme, salt and pepper, and cook for 5 minutes.
7. Heat the remaining olive oil in another pan.
8. 1 slice of baget bread and get to the serving plate.
9. Add the raw on it and decorate it with molten red pepper.
10. Add fish to the tab and decorate with black olive and tomatoes.
11. 11. Please note that you can use fish sauces in the recipe.

mushroom-asparagus-risotto.name: Mushroom Asparagus Risotto

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place chicken stock in a small saucepan over medium heat; bring to a simmer.

Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil and 1 tablespoon butter in a large saucepan over medium-high heat until butter starts to bubble. Add asparagus and morel mushrooms; sauté until tender, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a plate with any accumulated juices.

Heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil and 1 tablespoon butter in the same saucepan. Add shallot; cook and stir until softened, about 1 minute. Stir in arborio rice and cook until it starts to toast, about 1 minute. Pour in wine and cook until evaporated. Stir in thyme.

Pour 1/4 cup simmering stock over rice. Cook, stirring constantly, until stock is absorbed. Repeat with remaining stock until rice is tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes. Stir in asparagus and mushrooms with their juices and continue cooking until flavors combine, about 3 minutes more.

Remove rice from heat. Stir in remaining 2 tablespoons butter, Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, and parsley. Season with salt and black pepper. Garnish with balsamic vinegar and additional olive oil before serving.

mushroom-feijoada-teleculinaria.name: Mushroom Feijoada

ingredients.item: 1  tomate pequeno (ou 4 colheres (sopa) de polpa de tomate)

instructions: Descasque e pique finamente a cebola e os dentes de alho e refogue-os num tacho com um pouco de azeite e a folha de louro.
Add the tomato, cut into cubes (or tomato pulp), the carrot in slices and the sweet pepper and wrap well. Add the white wine and let it stew for about 5 minutes, in mild heat.
Cut the mushrooms in half and add them to the previous preparation, mixing well with the saute. Let it stew for another 5 minutes or until the mushrooms absorb the flavors well.
Finally, add both baked beans and, if necessary, add some water. Retrieve the salt and pepper and let it boil in a light for a few more minutes. Serve right away.

mushroom-pizza.name: Mushroom Pizza
instructions: Put a pizza stone or baking sheet on the middle oven rack. Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured work surface and roll out into a 14-inch circle. Transfer to a piece of parchment paper or a cookie sheet lightly dusted with flour or cornmeal. Cover with a kitchen towel; let stand at room temperature until ready to use.

Meanwhile, heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add cremini and maitake mushrooms; cook, stirring occasionally, until well browned and tender, 6 to 8 minutes. Stir in oregano, thyme, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper. Transfer mushroom mixture to a bowl. (Do not wipe skillet clean.)
Add 1 tablespoon oil to skillet. Add spinach and 1/4 teaspoon pepper; cook, stirring frequently, until spinach is wilted, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.

Stir together ricotta, Pecorino-Romano, garlic, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon each salt and pepper in a bowl until well combined. Brush dough with remaining 1 tablespoon oil. Spread ricotta mixture in an even layer over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border. Sprinkle mozzarella evenly over ricotta mixture. Top with cooked mushrooms and spinach.
Carefully transfer pizza on parchment to hot pizza stone or baking sheet in the oven. Bake until cheese is bubbly and crust is deeply golden brown, 15 to 18 minutes.
Transfer pizza and parchment to a cutting board; let stand 5 minutes. Remove parchment. Garnish with additional thyme, a few grinds of pepper, and shaved Pecorino-Romano cheese.

mushroom-quesadillas.name: Mushroom Quesadillas
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Place the tortilla in the pan and cook for about 1 minute, until it begins to bubble.
Flip the tortilla over and sprinkle cheese all over the top.
Once the cheese begins to melt, top half of the tortilla with mushrooms, and fold in half.
Cook for 2 minutes on each side, until the cheese is melted and everything is hot.
Remove the quesadilla from the heat, open, and add your choice of stuffings.

mushroom-snack-and-creamy-recipe-comeder.name: Mushroom Snack: And Creamy Recipe
mushroom-snack-and-creamy-recipe-comeder.original_name: Snack de champiñones: receta fácil y cremosa

ingredients.item: 3 Jalapeno chiles with no seeds and finely minced
1 cup of fresh mushrooms, finely minced

instructions: In a frying pan with medium heat, heat up olive oil. Add the mantle chili, onion, jalapeno, mushrooms, salt and pepper. Jumps for 4-5 minutes till the vegetables are soft. Withdraw from the fire and let cool.
Jumps for 4-5 minutes till the vegetables are soft. Withdraw from the fire and let cool.
In a deep bowl, beat the cream cheese with sour cream, salt and pepper to a homogenous texture.
When the mushroom and chili mix is cold, add it to the creamy mix and stir well.
Refrigerate for 1-2 hours for flavors to integrate. Enjoy cold, with totopes or salted cookies.

mushrooms-in-paper-teleculinaria.name: Mushrooms In Paper

ingredients.item: Pimenta acabada de moer q. b.

instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Remove your foot from the mushrooms, slice them into slices and put them in a bowl.
Depois limpe os cogumelos e disponha-os em cima de uma folha de papel vegetal dobrada ao meio. Reserve.

Add spinach to the mushroom's feet, add chopped thyme, nutmeg and peeled and crushed garlic. Season with salt and pepper, water with olive oil and mix gently. Divide the mixture by the mushrooms and close the paper so that the edges are tightly closed as packaged. Put them on a tray and put them in the oven for about 20 minutes. Remove and serve decorated to taste.

mushrooms-with-ham-in-air-fryer-pequerec.name: Mushrooms With Ham In Air Fryer
mushrooms-with-ham-in-air-fryer-pequerec.original_name: Champiñones con jamón en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 1 cucharada de aceite de oliva virgen extra (15 ml)

instructions: We clear 400 g of mushrooms with a moist cloth or remove their skin (I better love this last method) and cut them into quarters or thick sheets.
In a bowl we mix mushrooms with 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 chopped garlic tooth and black pepper to suit them.
We add 80 g of ham and we remove well.

We purport the air frying at 200ºC for 5 minutes. We put the mushrooms in the air fryer, and they are spread out into the basket or, if you don't want to dirty the basket, you can use some containers, as I have.
We cook at 190 ° C for 10-12 minutes, and remove the contents of the plate half as soon as they have been put to wear.
We get out, we get salt (normally we don't have to add it by ham) and we sprinkle some minced parsley if we feel like it.

mustard-argiro.name: Mustard

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons of water at the end
3 tablespoons of water at the end

instructions: Place all the ingredients in a glass bowl except for the 3 tablespoons of water.
Cover the bowl and leave it on the counter for 3 days.
Add all marinated ingredients into a strong blender, and mash the mixture as much as possible.
Add the lukewarm water to dilute the composition and for better mashed mustard.
Try the taste of mustard and make the taste according to our taste with more honey, more vinegar etc.
After the ingredients are mashed, put them in a glass jar, cover and refrigerate for up to 2 months.
The homemade mustard must stay 2-3 days in the refrigerator to reduce the intensity.
At first it is very strong after 2 days in the refrigerator the taste softens.

mustard-roasted-potatoes.name: Mustard-roasted Potatoes
instructions: Place potatoes and 1 Tbsp. salt in a medium saucepan and cover with 2" cold water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, and cook until potatoes are tender, 8–10 minutes. Drain, shaking off excess water.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add potatoes and cook, turning occasionally, until golden brown. Remove from heat and add mustard; season with salt and pepper and toss to combine. Reserve ½ cup potatoes for Frisee, Potato, and Apple Salad.

mystic-white-russian.name: Mystic White Russian
instructions: Rim an old fashioned glass with peanut butter powder and cocoa powder. Fill with ice. Pour in vodka, Frangelico liqueur, and whiskey. Top with milk and garnish with chocolate syrup.
